recommendation.title: Pre-plan rest week — arrive fresh
recommendation.reasoning: Tomorrow falls 8 days before Week 1 (July 7). TSB is -5.4 — mild residual fatigue from the 10km run on June 27 and 4km on June 28. HRV is 82ms with no baseline yet (day 1 of tracking). Sleep quality was excellent (deep 91min, REM 70min, score 90) though duration was slightly short at 6.3h. Priority this week is full recovery so you arrive at July 7 with a positive TSB and fresh legs.
recommendation.sessionDetail: Optional 20-30 min very easy jog (HR < 140) or complete rest. No targets, no intensity, no pressure. The pre-plan week is not about adding fitness — it is about arriving at Week 1 ready to execute.
recommendation.bikeNote: Bike both ways is fine — the commute is pure zone 1 at this stage and will not interfere with recovery.
recommendation.swimNote: No pool session until Monday July 7 (Week 1 swim class).
